channel.title: portability on Lei.Chat()
channel.description: Recent content in portability on Lei.Chat()

item.title: Gluon: Explicit Performance
item.description: Gluon enhances the Triton language and compiler solutions with an additional approach towards GPU kernel programming. It strikes a different balance in the portability and performance spectrum to expose more compiler internals; thus giving developers more explicit controls to reach higher performance ceiling. In this blog post I’ll explain Gluon per my understanding. I will also use this as an opportunity to talk about domain-specific languages, particularly in the context of dramatically evolving agentic software development.
